priority_flags: ⚑ Displaced Student — May Need Extra Support

agent3.summary: This student has a moderate risk level, with low academic performance and limited units approved in their first semester.

interventions.action: Encourage the student to meet with an advisor for personalized guidance on course selection and academic planning.
Recommend a review of academic resources like tutoring services or study groups.
Suggest exploring financial aid options to address potential tuition concerns and ensure continued enrollment.

agent3.message_to_student: We're here to support you in achieving your academic goals. Let's work together to develop a plan that will help you succeed this semester.
